sourcePolicy: Official provider supplement facts first when exact; package photos are verification evidence and fallback. Mark uncertain reads as needs_review.

supplementProducts.name: Longevity Mix - Blood Orange
supplementProducts.purpose: Morning drink mix for energy, focus, recovery, metabolism, and longevity support.

timing.note: Blueprint presents Longevity Mix as part of the morning protocol; avoid late evening if the energy/focus ingredients feel activating.

storage.label: Room temp
storage.note: No refrigerator requirement found on the official product page; keep shelf-stable at room temperature unless the package label says otherwise.

supplementProducts.name: Essential Capsules
supplementProducts.purpose: Daily micronutrient and longevity capsule stack for energy, immunity, cognition, bone health, and cell defense.

timing.note: Blueprint directions say to take 2 capsules in the morning with food, including with Longevity Mix.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: Official product guidance uses cool, dry storage or gives no refrigerator requirement; keep away from heat, sunlight, and moisture rather than putting it in the fridge.

ingredients.labelNotes: Root extract standardized 3% rosavins / 1% salidroside; 9 mg total rosavins.

storage.label: Cool, dry

storage.label: Cool, dry

supplementProducts.name: D3 + K2 Drops
supplementProducts.purpose: Vitamin D3 + K2 drop supplement used in Tilman's morning protocol.

ingredients.labelNotes: Rossmann product page lists Vitamin D3 37.5 mcg per 5-drop daily serving, equal to 1500 IU.
Rossmann product page lists Vitamin K2 80 mcg per 5-drop daily serving; page lists menaquinone but does not specify MK-7 form.

timing.note: Rossmann directions say 5 drops per day; vitamin D/K are fat-soluble, so morning or daytime with a fat-containing meal is a practical fit.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: Store protected from heat and light according to the provider/package guidance; this is not a refrigerator instruction.

supplementProducts.name: Magnesium Complex 11 Ultra XL
supplementProducts.purpose: Broad-spectrum magnesium complex for daily magnesium supplementation and muscle, energy, nervous-system, and recovery contexts.

ingredients.perServing: 1 capsule; directions: 1-2 capsules daily with a meal
ingredients.labelNotes: 11 magnesium forms including citrate, malate, gluconate, taurate, glycinate, lysinate, ascorbate, lactate, ConcenTrace minerals, magnesium oxide, and Sango coral.
From magnesium ascorbate / buffered vitamin C.

timing.note: Sunday directions are meal-based rather than clock-based; magnesium can be placed in daytime or evening depending on tolerance and routine.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: Official product guidance uses cool, dry storage or gives no refrigerator requirement; keep away from heat, sunlight, and moisture rather than putting it in the fridge.

supplementProducts.purpose: Apigenin supplement for calm, sleep, and stress-relief support contexts.

ingredients.labelNotes: Swanson supplement facts list Apigenin 50 mg per 1 vegan capsule.

timing.note: Swanson describes Apigenin around restorative sleep and stress relief; use evening as the catalog timing slot unless personal response differs.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: Swanson lists cool, dry storage for this capsule product; no fridge storage is indicated.

supplementProducts.name: L-Theanine Double Strength 200 mg
supplementProducts.purpose: L-Theanine plus inositol supplement for relaxation, calm focus, and stress-management contexts.

ingredients.perServing: 1 veg capsule; directions: 1 capsule 1-2 times daily as needed
ingredients.labelNotes: NOW supplement facts list L-Theanine 200 mg per 1 veg capsule.
NOW supplement facts list Inositol 100 mg per 1 veg capsule.

timing.note: NOW describes L-Theanine as promoting relaxation while maintaining alertness; daytime or evening can both fit depending on the use case.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: NOW lists cool, dry storage after opening for this capsule product; no fridge storage is indicated.

supplementProducts.name: Magnesium bisglycinat
supplementProducts.purpose: Vegan magnesium bisglycinate supplement for nervous-system, recovery, and muscle-support contexts.

ingredients.perServing: 3 capsules daily; 1 capsule 3 times daily or daily dose spread as needed
ingredients.labelNotes: Natural elements lists 300 mg elemental magnesium per recommended daily dose of 3 capsules.

timing.note: Natural elements recommends 1 capsule three times daily and says the daily dose can also be taken at once or spread through the day, preferably with or after meals.

storage.label: Cool, dry
storage.note: Natural Elements lists closed, cool, dry, light-protected storage for this capsule product; no fridge storage is indicated.

Sunday Natural support guidance: fat-soluble nutrients are best taken with a meal; minerals and trace elements are best taken outside a meal unless the product says otherwise.
Sunday Natural support guidance: time of day is often flexible, but stimulating nutrients may fit better during the day and melatonin-like sleep products in the evening.
NIH ODS vitamin D fact sheet; vitamin D is fat-soluble and absorption depends on dietary fat handling.
MedlinePlus vitamin D page; consumer-facing NIH context that vitamin D is better absorbed with a meal or snack containing fat.
NCCIH rhodiola safety page; side effects can include insomnia, supporting conservative earlier-day timing when rhodiola is present.
NCCIH ashwagandha safety page; used as ingredient-level context for adaptogen timing and cautions.
